lsp.justification: Fully correct per the GT: it identifies the 3 worker threads, per-worker `bio_jobs`/`bio_jobs_counter` protection by `bio_mutex[worker]`, the separate `bio_mutex_comp` for `bio_comp_list`, unlocked `job_comp_pipe`, atomic AOF fsync fields, and immutable unlocked `server.bio_cpulist`. It also correctly excludes the common traps (`bio_threads`, read-only worker/job mapping tables, transferred `bio_job` contents); the only minor omission is not listing the mutex globals themselves as shared state rows, but they are clearly named as the synchronization primitives.
